userStories.title: HealthConnectReader pagination tests
userStories.description: Add unit tests for readBloodPressure() and readWeight() pagination. Mock HealthConnectClient multi-page responses.
userStories.notes: Implemented via constructor injection (optional client param) instead of mockkStatic. 4 pagination tests pass on CI.

userStories.title: HealthConnectReader Oura Ring filtering tests
userStories.description: Test Oura Ring device filtering in readSleep() and readHRV(). Mixed sources, Oura-only, no-Oura fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: mixed Oura+Pixel filters to Oura
Test: readHeartRateVariability no Oura returns all
userStories.notes: 4 Oura filtering tests added to HealthConnectReaderTest.kt. All pass on CI.

userStories.title: HealthConnectReader body match window boundary tests
userStories.description: Test +/-1 hour body match in readWeight(). Boundaries at 0s, 3600s, 3601s.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: no body comp null fields
userStories.notes: 4 boundary tests added. Uses any<ReadRecordsRequest<*>>() with returnsMany (call-order) due to type erasure. All pass on CI.

userStories.title: SyncWorker doWork orchestration and retry tests
userStories.description: Test three-phase flow with TestListenableWorkerBuilder. Token expiry, API failure, anomaly notification.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: expired change token removed from prefs, execution continues
Test: anomaly notification when systolic>=140 OR diastolic>=90
userStories.notes: 7 tests: all succeed, BP fail retry, expired token removed, HC exception continues, anomaly systolic 140, anomaly diastolic 90, blank API key failure. All pass on CI.

userStories.title: SyncWorker queue entity builders and scheduling tests
userStories.description: Test toQueueEntity() mappings and schedule/cancel methods.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: BP toQueueEntity sets dataType to blood_pressure
Test: Body maps weight bodyFat leanMass
userStories.notes: 6 tests in SyncWorkerTest.kt. Entity mapping verified via DAO insertAll capture + Gson deserialization. Schedule/cancel via WorkManagerTestInitHelper. All pass on CI.

userStories.title: DashboardViewModel readiness scoring tests
userStories.description: Test computeReadiness() all boundaries. Score>=4 Good, >=2 Easy, else Recovery.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests added to EXISTING DashboardViewModelTest.kt file
Uses Turbine to observe StateFlow readinessLabel and readinessReason
Test: all three metrics null => readinessLabel is null
userStories.notes: 4 readiness tests added to existing DashboardViewModelTest.kt. UnconfinedTestDispatcher + drainAll() pattern for IO timing. All pass on CI.

userStories.title: SettingsViewModel server checks and semver tests
userStories.description: Test server connection, version check, compareVersions().
userStories.notes: 5 tests using MockWebServer + mockkObject(SecurePrefs) + mockkObject(HealthConnectReader.Companion). UnconfinedTestDispatcher + repeat(3) drainAll(). All pass on CI.

userStories.title: BiometricLockManager authentication flow tests
userStories.description: Test isEnabled, canAuthenticate, setEnabled guard, callback routing.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: setEnabled guard when no biometrics
userStories.notes: 6 tests using mockkStatic(BiometricManager::class) + mockkObject(SecurePrefs). All pass on CI.

userStories.title: SecurePrefs encryption and migration tests
userStories.description: Test migration, get/set methods, clearAll, fallback logic with Robolectric.
userStories.notes: 8 tests via mockkObject(SecurePrefs) — EncryptedSharedPreferences needs Android Keystore unavailable in Robolectric. All pass on CI.

userStories.title: SyncQueueDao Room database tests
userStories.description: Room in-memory DB: insertAll IGNORE, getPending sorted, deleteByIds, pendingCount.
userStories.notes: 5 tests with Room.inMemoryDatabaseBuilder + Robolectric. room-testing dependency added. All pass on CI.
